sentences.target: Viele Leute leiden im Büro unter Stress.
sentences.reading: /ˈfiːlə ˈlɔʏ̯tə ˈlaɪ̯dn̩ ɪm byˈʁoː ˈʊntɐ ʃtʁɛs/

translations.de: Viele Leute leiden im Büro unter Stress.
translations.ipa: /ˈfiːlə ˈlɔʏ̯tə ˈlaɪ̯dn̩ ɪm byˈʁoː ˈʊntɐ ʃtʁɛs/
translations.en: Many people suffer from stress at the office.
translations.es: Muchas personas sufren estrés en la oficina.
translations.fr: Beaucoup de gens sont stressés au bureau.
translations.it: Molte persone soffrono di stress in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 许多人在办公室压力很大。
translations.yue: 唔少人喺辦公室壓力好大。
translations.ru: Многие люди испытывают стресс в офисе.
translations.pt: Muitas pessoas sofrem com o estresse no escritório.
translations.vi: Nhiều người bị căng thẳng ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: الكثير من الناس يعانون من التوتر في المكتب.
translations.nl: Veel mensen hebben last van stress op kantoor.
translations.uk: Багато людей зазнають стресу в офісі.
translations.hi: बहुत से लोग दफ़्तर में तनाव झेलते हैं.
translations.pl: Wiele osób odczuwa stres w biurze.
translations.id: Banyak orang mengalami stres di kantor.
translations.ro: Mulți oameni sunt stresați la birou.
translations.cs: Mnoho lidí trpí stresem v kanceláři.
translations.da: Mange mennesker oplever stress på kontoret.
translations.ja: 多くの人がオフィスでストレスを感じる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite quantifier functioning as determiner; modifies the plural noun 'Leute' (nominative plural).
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; selects a prepositional complement with 'unter' to indicate the cause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP ('im Büro').
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im' (dative singular); location.
Preposition; here used with dative after 'leiden' to mark the source/cause of suffering.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'unter' (bare dative singular); denotes the cause.

sentences.target: Wir leiden hier oft unter Lärm.

translations.de: Wir leiden hier oft unter Lärm.
translations.en: We often suffer from noise here.
translations.es: Aquí a menudo nos molesta el ruido.
translations.fr: Ici, le bruit nous gêne souvent.
translations.it: Qui spesso il rumore ci dà fastidio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们这里经常被噪音困扰。
translations.yue: 我哋喺呢度成日畀噪音困擾。
translations.pt: Aqui, o barulho nos incomoda com frequência.
translations.he: כאן רעש מפריע לנו לעיתים קרובות.
translations.tr: Burada sık sık gürültüden rahatsız oluyoruz.
translations.vi: Ở đây chúng tôi thường bị tiếng ồn làm phiền.
translations.nl: Hier hebben we vaak last van lawaai.
translations.hu: Itt gyakran zavar minket a zaj.
translations.hi: यहाँ हमें अक्सर शोर से परेशानी होती है.
translations.el: Εδώ ο θόρυβος μας ενοχλεί συχνά.
translations.nb: Her blir vi ofte plaget av støy.
translations.id: Di sini kami sering terganggu oleh kebisingan.
translations.sv: Här blir vi ofta störda av oljud.
translations.ro: Aici suntem adesea deranjați de zgomot.
translations.da: Her bliver vi ofte generet af støj.
translations.ja: ここではよく騒音に悩まされます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes 'unter' + dative to indicate what is suffered from.
Locative adverb; specifies place.
Frequency adverb; modifies the verb phrase.
Preposition selecting dative; marks the cause/source with 'leiden'.
Common noun; object of 'unter' (dative singular, no article); cause of suffering.

sentences.target: Ich will nicht leiden beim Zahnarzt.

translations.de: Ich will nicht leiden beim Zahnarzt.
translations.en: I don't want to suffer at the dentist.
translations.es: No quiero sufrir en el dentista.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas souffrir chez le dentiste.
translations.ru: Я не хочу страдать у стоматолога.
translations.he: אני לא רוצה לסבול אצל רופא השיניים.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn chịu đau khi đi nha sĩ.
translations.ar: لا أريد أن أعاني عند طبيب الأسنان.
translations.nl: Ik wil niet lijden bij de tandarts.
translations.uk: Я не хочу страждати у стоматолога.
translations.hi: मैं दंत चिकित्सक के पास दर्द नहीं सहना चाहता।
translations.el: Δεν θέλω να υποφέρω στον οδοντίατρο.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke ha det vondt hos tannlegen.
translations.id: Saya tidak mau menderita saat ke dokter gigi.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte ha ont hos tandläkaren.
translations.ro: Nu vreau să sufăr la dentist.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke have ondt hos tandlægen.
translations.ja: 歯医者で痛い思いをしたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the matrix clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement ('leiden').
Negation particle; negates the verb phrase headed by the infinitive.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'will'.
Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP ('beim Zahnarzt').
Common noun, masculine; object of 'bei' (dative singular); location/setting.

sentences.target: Sie leiden im Sommer unter der Hitze.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈlaɪ̯dn̩ ɪm ˈzɔmɐ ˈʊntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈhɪt͡sə/

translations.de: Sie leiden im Sommer unter der Hitze.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈlaɪ̯dn̩ ɪm ˈzɔmɐ ˈʊntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈhɪt͡sə/
translations.en: They suffer from the heat in summer.
translations.es: En verano sufren por el calor.
translations.fr: Ils souffrent de la chaleur en été.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们夏天被热得很难受。
translations.pt: No verão, eles sofrem com o calor.
translations.vi: Vào mùa hè họ khổ vì nóng.
translations.nl: In de zomer hebben ze last van de hitte.
translations.hi: गर्मी में वे गर्मी से परेशान होते हैं.
translations.el: Το καλοκαίρι υποφέρουν από τη ζέστη.
translations.nb: Om sommeren sliter de i varmen.
translations.id: Di musim panas mereka menderita karena panas.
translations.sv: På sommaren lider de av hettan.
translations.da: Om sommeren lider de under varmen.
translations.ja: 夏は暑さでつらい思いをしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; here most likely 3rd person plural nominative (could also be formal 'Sie'); subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; combines with 'unter' to indicate the cause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP ('im Sommer').
Common noun; object of 'im' (dative singular); temporal modifier.
Preposition; here selects dative and marks the cause/source.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Hitze' after 'unter'.
Common noun, feminine; object of 'unter' (dative singular); cause of suffering.
